nodes.name: Prinia
nodes.summary: Prinia（Prinia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联29种鸟类，如喜山山鹪莺、斑紋鷦鶯、Annam prinia等29种鸟类。

nodes.name: Annam prinia
nodes.summary: The Annam prinia (Prinia rocki) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It and the Burmese prinia (P. cooki) were formerly lumped with Deignan's prinia (P. polychroa) as the brown prinia. It is found in the Đà Lạt Plateau of the Annamite Mountains in a small portion of southern Vietnam and eastern Cambodia. It is monotypic and has no known subspecies. It was split from P. cooki and P. polychroa following a phylogenetic study published in 2019. References
